screens.name: projects/15115657045286706662/screens/6122fb3e2a8d4bc9ad85f2739d3b4ea8
screens.prompt:
Title: Lucas Santana Portfolio 2026 Landing
Context: Premium software engineer portfolio landing experience for Lucas Santana, 2026 edition.
Description of the screen: A cinematic, neo-dark motion editorial landing page for a software engineer. The layout is asymmetrical and high-contrast, featuring a dark graphite background with cyan 'signal' accents and amber highlights. The hero section uses massive, expressive serif and sans-serif typography for the name 'LUCAS SANTANA'. The design includes oversized metric numerals (e.g., '08+ Years', '50M+ Users') with layered glow effects. Sections are designed for scroll-based motion: a pinned narrative column on the left with a scrolling project gallery on the right, diagonal composition breaks, and a horizontal marquee of technical skills. Featured projects use parallax media plates. The contact CTA is a bold, high-impact block with a large amber arrow icon. The overall feel is 'editorial tech'—sophisticated, dark, and motion-ready.
Platform: web
Form factor: desktop
screens.title: Lucas Santana Portfolio 2026 Landing

outputComponents.text:
The design for Lucas Santana's 2026 Portfolio has been generated with a high-end, cinematic editorial aesthetic:

- **Portfolio Landing Experience**: A dark graphite, motion-ready desktop interface featuring oversized typography, asymmetrical layouts, and high-contrast cyan and amber accents. It includes a pinned narrative column, parallax project plates, and large-scale metric displays designed for sophisticated scroll-based animations.

Would you like to explore a detailed "Project Deep-Dive" page or perhaps refine the color palette with more amber highlights?

outputComponents.suggestion: Design a Project Deep-Dive page with a vertical case study layout.
Add a "Process" section with a horizontal scroll timeline.
Change the cyan accents to a deep violet for a different futuristic mood.
